notes: Compact 315 x 265 battery tray/deck with battery clamp slots and cable clip holes. Electrical holders mount on separate compact rails/tabs.
Compact 340 x 90 front service rail for folded Relay Rev C tray or measured front-cavity bracket; replaces the earlier large shared carrier.
Compact single vehicle-side chassis pickup plate. Use crush tubes/spacers where required; final slot pitch follows the actual chassis location.
Compact upright bridge side plates from the single chassis pickup to tray/rail saddle; not a second chassis fixing location.
Battery hold-down crossbar template; final slot spacing follows actual battery and clamp rod positions.
Compact 170 x 110 tab/knock guard for master cutoff; must not block emergency access.
